title: Casual 3ish Mile Saturday Morning Run
description: Join us for a casual 3ish-mile run in the neighborhood. All paces are welcome as long as you can complete the distance. We meet at the bottom of the Windmuller Park stairs, at 54th Street and Woodside Avenue. We will wait 5-10 minutes to allow for late arrivals. Please be prompt! We often get coffee […]

title: Zumba with Veva
description: Start your Saturday off with an enjoyable and effective workout! (At office during inclement weather.)

title: Saturday AM Kids Art Club! / Clases de Arte para Niñxs!
address: 84-26 37th Ave, Jackson Heights, New York, 11372, United States
description: Kids Art Club! Clases de Arte para Niñxs! – Lessons change Weekly Students learn about art theory, movements and how to find and use their creative voice. Led by artist instructors. Geared towards the process of learning & finding your creative voice. All young artists learn in different ways, and we allow room for them […]

title: Ridgewood Runners 5K
address: Jackie Robinson Pkwy, Brooklyn, NY 11208, USA
description: Ridgewood Runners is a community-based run club founded in 2023 in Ridgewood, Queens, built on the idea that running should feel joyful, inclusive, and for everyone. What started as a small group has grown into a vibrant crew of runners of all levels who show up each week to move, connect, and support one another. We meet weekly for runs […]

title: Boxing/Kickboxing Workout
description: America’s Finest Karate & Kickboxing will join us on 34 Ave & 93 St to offer free kickboxing class (12+ years old).

title: Food Scrap Drop Off (FSDO)
description: Moore Jackson Community Garden’s Composting Committee collects food scraps throughout the year. During colder months, the bins you see here will be outside our fence by our double gate on 51st Street between 31/32 Aves. Please only drop off scraps on Saturdays between 9 a.m. and 12 noon.

title: JHBG’s Tree LC
description: We need your help to keep our trees and gardens healthy and clean! Meet 10am in front of 3541 80th st! We will gather our tools and head out to the treebeds and gardens to water, clean and mulch. We work until noon. No experience necessary – we supply work gloves, tools and guidance. We […]

title: 34 Ave World Bike Ride
description: Beginner to intermediate rides to points of interest in & around Queens. Rides are open to all. No bike? Are you 16 yo or over? No worries @Citibike has you covered. Download app before arrival. No helmet? Please DM us before the ride and we will bring one for you.

title: 34 Ave Gardening Club
description: Meet up at 10:00am 34 Ave & 93 St to pick up gloves and tools and for street assignment.

title: Adult and Pediatric First Aid/CPR/AED Course with Certification
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Free CPR & First Aid Certification Course provided by the American Red Cross Learn how to handle common emergencies, including: • Burns, cuts, and scrapes • Sudden illnesses • Head, neck, and back injuries • Heat and cold emergencies • Breathing and cardiac emergencies (all ages) Details: • Certification: Adult & Pediatric First Aid/CPR/AED (valid […]

title: Tell TD Bank: ICE Out of Your Parking Lots !!
description: Queens communities have experienced high levels of ICE presence and kidnappings over the past few months. ICE has been regularly using TD Bank parking lots on Northern Blvd in Jackson Heights and other locations in order to stage their raids. Join us in protesting ICE’s access to TD Bank parking lots on Saturday from 12pm-1pm. […]

title: Clases de Baile – Cumbia Sonidera
description: Cumbia Sonidera Lessons- all ages. Come ready to dance with our instructor extraordinaire @coolmarx (inside school or outside – instructor will decide)
